steps.t: Duinhir and soldiers of Gondor can be found at the Host of the West encampment, on the border of North Ithilien and Dagorlad. You should speak to some…
Aragorn can be found at the Host of the West encampment, on the border of North Ithilien and Dagorlad. You should speak with Aragorn.
Duinhir can be found at the Host of the West encampment, on the border of North Ithilien and Dagorlad. You should speak with Duinhir.
Damrod can be found to the north-east of Cair Andros at Caladuil. You should speak to Damrod.
Cair Andros is an island fortress in the Anduin River, bordering North Ithilien and Talath Anor. You should scout the entrance of Cair Andros.
Duinhir can be found near Cair Andros. You should speak to Duinhir.
